items.label: Review existing tables for gigs, bands, users, and dates (including current foreign keys and constraints).
Add NOT NULL constraints to bandID and other critical foreign keys.
Create finances_ledger table (ledgerID, dateID, category, label, targetUserID, amount, status).
Add settlementID field for grouping rows by settlement version.
Add createdAt / updatedAt timestamps to finances_ledger.
Add ON DELETE RESTRICT constraints for all financial links.
Ensure every write to finances_ledger also updates dates.dateUpdated.
Migrate or backfill any existing financial data into finances_ledger (if applicable).
Implement service to read gross amount from dates.datePrice.
Implement service to aggregate expenses (category = expense) per date.
Implement service to compute net profit and proposed distributions (fixed rates + splits).
Create admin-only Worksheet API endpoints for CRUD on draft ledger line items.
Create endpoint to publish a settlement (assign / bump settlementID, set statuses).
Block edits/deletes for rows with status = "paid".
Allow corrections only via new adjustment rows tied to the same settlementID.
Add "Finance" tab to the Band Admin area (owner/admin only).
Build line-item editor UI for expenses and payouts in draft state.
Show live Waterfall summary: Gross → Expenses → Net → Distribution.
Add balance indicator (Gross == Expenses + Payouts).
Add action to save worksheet drafts.
Add action to publish settlements from the UI.
Add view of previous settlements per date (by settlementID).
Build "My Wallet" / Valet page for logged-in members.
List all gigs where targetUserID = current user.
Display per-gig payout amount and status (Owed, Pending, Paid).
Hide gross gig price and other members' payouts from members.
Implement UI for members to record money they received via Valet.
Add backend endpoint that writes member-initiated payout entries to finances_ledger.
Notify members when a relevant settlement is published.
Send silent admin/owner notification when a member files a payout via Valet.
Build per-date admin overview of payouts, expenses, and settlements.
Build per-member admin overview of owed vs reported as received.
Verify admin/owner worksheet and gross price access.
Verify member-only personal ledger and Valet visibility.
Verify Tech/Manager read-only access where applicable.
Add or configure audit logging for key financial actions.
Write tests for Waterfall calculations and edge cases.
Write tests for immutability after status = "paid".
Write tests for visibility rules and permissions.
Write tests for constraint behavior and ON DELETE RESTRICT.
